html:
Exclusive to:

“Bedazzle a Spider Den to pacify the spiders nearby. Bedazzled dens do not grow.”

-

The Den Decorating Set is an item which can only be crafted by Webber, exclusive to Don't Starve Together. This item can be used on all tiers of Spider Dens.

A decorated den pacifies spiders in a radius of 12, 16, 20 units, in increasing spider den tier (4 units is equal to 1 turf).

The pacified spiders then are neutral to other players and no longer attack walls.

A decorated den will have creep radius reduced to 4. Turf tiles within 4 units of the decorated den will be covered in creep.

A decorated den does not grow, and does not become a spider queen.

A decorated den will revert to a normal den if it is attacked, or if any player or mob attacks any pacified spiders nearby.

Trivia

  • The Den Decorating Set was added as part of Webber's Character Refresh Update.

Gallery

  • Webber next to all tiers of Spider Dens, decorated.
  • Den Decorating Set concept art from Rhymes With Play #281
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

Den Decorating Set
"A nice home makes for a nice disposition."
Object Info
Perk
Decorates spider dens to pacify the spiders.
5 Uses
Can be Burned
Does not stack
Crafting
×1 ×1 ×2 ( only)
Filters
Tier
Always available
Miscellaneous
"spiderden_bedazzler"
Exclusive to:
“It looks like someone's been getting crafty.”
–Wilson
“Hey Webber, it's way more fun to burn paper than to draw on it!”
–Willow
“Monsterchild will draw Wolfgang next, yes?”
–Wolfgang
“I wonder if I might ask to borrow some colored pencils...”
–Wendy
“ART IS POINTLESS”
–WX-78
“Be sure to tidy up when you're finished, young arachnid.”
–Wickerbottom
“Always gotta support the arts.”
–Woodie
“Careful child, it's a slippery slope towards a career in the arts.”
–Maxwell
“The spiderchild has taken up the arts, has he?”
–Wigfrid
“We know what'll make our spiderfriends happy, decorating their house!”
–Webber
“It's nice to see the petit monsieur expressing his creativity!”
–Warly
“Making pretty things”
–Wormwood
“Doing some home improvements, kiddo?”
–Winona
“I should paint mustaches on the mortals while they're sleeping...”
–Wortox
“What you making Webby boy?”
–Wurt
“He's well on his way to getting his Arts and Crafts badge.”
–Walter
“He's certainly got a creative streak, doesn't he?”
–Wanda
“Bedazzle a Spider Den to pacify the spiders nearby. Bedazzled dens do not grow.”
-
The Den Decorating Set is an item which can only be crafted by Webber, exclusive to Don't Starve Together. This item can be used on all tiers of Spider Dens.
A decorated den pacifies spiders in a radius of 12, 16, 20 units, in increasing spider den tier (4 units is equal to 1 turf).
The pacified spiders then are neutral to other players and no longer attack walls.
A decorated den will have creep radius reduced to 4. Turf tiles within 4 units of the decorated den will be covered in creep.
A decorated den does not grow, and does not become a spider queen.
A decorated den will revert to a normal den if it is attacked, or if any player or mob attacks any pacified spiders nearby.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Den Decorating Set was added as part of Webber's Character Refresh Update.

Webber next to all tiers of Spider Dens, decorated.
Den Decorating Set concept art from Rhymes With Play #281

The '''Den Decorating Set''' is an item which can only be crafted by [[Webber]], exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. This item can be used on all tiers of [[Spider Den|Spider Dens]].

A decorated den pacifies spiders in a radius of 12, 16, 20 units, in increasing spider den tier (4 units is equal to 1 turf).

The pacified spiders then are neutral to other players and no longer attack walls.

A decorated den will have creep radius reduced to 4. Turf tiles within 4 units of the decorated den will be covered in creep.

A decorated den does not grow, and does not become a spider queen.

A decorated den will revert to a normal den if it is attacked, or if any player or mob attacks any pacified spiders nearby.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Den Decorating Set was added as part of [[Don't Starve/Version History|Webber's Character Refresh Update]].
